origin.rebirth: Esfandiyar returns with the power of an unstoppable warrior blessed by ancient energy.

story.intro: When darkness creates armies of destruction, the legendary warrior with the golden armor awakens.
story.mission: Protect the innocent and defend the gates between worlds.

powers.name: Golden Armor
powers.description: Creates an almost unbreakable energy armor.

powers.name: Seven Trials Power
powers.description: Gains strength from overcoming impossible challenges.
